name: CompTIA A+
exam_format: CBT, two exams (Core 1 + Core 2), performance-based + multiple choice
notes: Industry-standard IT support technician credential. Most-prepped IT credential in U.S. CTE. Revises every 3 years.

name: Google IT Support Professional Certificate
exam_format: Course completion + graded assessments across 5 courses
notes: Course-completion credential rather than exam credential. Stackable to CompTIA A+. Strong employer recognition through Google Employer Consortium.

name: Cisco Certified Support Technician (CCST) IT Support
notes: Newer credential (2023 launch); growing state-list adoption. Siblings: CCST Networking and CCST Cybersecurity (different sub-clusters).

name: Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)
notes: Entry Microsoft 365 / cloud services fundamentals. Primary home is Web & Cloud; listed here because IT Support teachers use it.

name: ITIL 4 Foundation
notes: IT service management foundation. Stronger PS/college fit than HS.

name: TestOut PC Pro
notes: Performance-simulation heavy. Aligns closely to CompTIA A+ content post-acquisition. Common in HS CTE labs.
